data.title: Bitcoin nears record high, trades at over $122,000 (close to $124,000 ATH set in August). Investor sentiment shifts towards treating it as 'digital gold' amid US government shutdown and economic uncertainty. Spot gold rises 0.5% to $3,876.55 per ounce.
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO BTC) is on the verge of hitting its all-time high, indicating a potential change in investor sentiment towards regarding the cryptocurrency as a safe-haven asset akin to gold amidst prolonged economic uncertainty. Bitcoin saw a rise of around 1.6% on Friday, trading above $122,000, slightly below its peak of roughly $124,000 recorded in August. This surge aligns with the current U.S. government shutdown, contributing to widespread economic ambiguity. Concurrently, spot gold rose by 0.5% in early Friday trading to $3,876.55 per ounce, resulting in a weekly increase of over 2%... Find the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nvidia and other AI stocks set to rise as data centers boost 3 on watchlist. 5 stocks near buy points.
data.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) data centers are a key factor influencing the stock performance of three companies highlighted in the weekend watchlist. Among them, Nvidia along with other AI-related stocks are showing strength with potential buy points. This reflects the growing significance of AI technology in the investment landscape. The mentioned stocks are at the forefront due to their association with AI, indicating a trend towards AI-driven investments. This development highlights the increasing interest and potential growth opportunities in companies related to artificial intelligence.

data.title: China's ICH exhibition in Milan highlights BOE O•SPACE, fusing tech and aesthetics; opened on Oct 3 at Palazzo Serbelloni.
data.description: A recent event took place on October 3, 2025, in Milan, Italy, where the 2025 Reviving Craft – China's Intangible Cultural Heritage and Contemporary Design exhibition and BOE O•SPACE were launched at Palazzo Serbelloni. This exhibition showcases a fusion of technology and traditional cultural heritage.

data.title: Top free AI image editors were tested to review their advantages and drawbacks. See how they compare based on today's standards.
data.description: Artificial intelligence has transformed image editing workflows significantly. The process has evolved from complex and difficult tasks to simple prompts in plain English. Currently, the top free AI models are performing exceptionally well. The advancement in AI technology has made it easier for users to edit images efficiently and accurately. With this progress, editing images has become more accessible to a wider audience.

data.title: MG debuts at BusWorld Brussels launching iEV12 all-electric city bus & B12E chassis.
data.description: In Brussels on October 4, 2025, the popular automotive brand MG showcased its new commercial vehicle brand, MG COMMERCIAL, at BusWorld Brussels with the theme "Find You More." The debut featured the unveiling of their first all-electric city bus, the iEV12.

data.title: During government shutdown, Trump targets Democratic-run cities/states by cutting or pausing billions in funding.
data.description: The federal government has reduced or suspended funding totaling billions of dollars to cities and states governed by Democrats since government operations ceased.

data.title: Macao Week at China Pavilion, World Expo 2025 Osaka starts with "Experience Macao" theme for 3 days, on Oct 3; includes creative exhibitions & business exchanges.
data.description: On October 3, Macao Week kicked off at the China Pavilion in the Expo 2025 Osaka site in Osaka, Japan. The event, running from October 2 to 4, is centered around the theme "Experience Macao" and includes various creative exhibitions and business exchanges.

data.title: XRP drops under $3, facing risk of sharp sell-off with over $500M in short liquidation pools between $2.89 and $2.73.
data.description: XRP is facing a potential risk of a significant sell-off as a result of over $500 million worth of short liquidation pools located between $2.89 and $2.73. The cryptocurrency's support level at $3 must be reclaimed to avoid this scenario.

data.title: Global Human Papilloma Virus/HPV Test and Pap Smear/Test Market to reach US$3.94 billion by 2030, with 10.0% CAGR growth from 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of October 4, 2025, the worldwide market for Human Papilloma Virus/HPV tests and Pap Smears was worth around $2.29 billion in 2024. By 2025, this market had grown to roughly $2.44 billion. Experts predict a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.0% for this market segment from 2025 through 2030, leading to a projected increase in value.

data.title: Global Streaming Analytics Market projected to reach $7.78 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 12.4% from $4.34 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported on October 4, 2025, that the global Streaming Analytics Market is estimated to grow significantly, with a projected size of USD 7.78 billion by 2030 compared to USD 4.34 billion in 2025. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.4% during the forecast period. Detailed market information can be found in 360 tables and 80...

data.title: Access control market to reach $15.8 billion by 2030, growing at 8.3% according to MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: According to a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™, the access control market in Delray Beach, Florida is projected to experience significant growth in the coming years. Starting at USD 10.62 billion in 2025, it is expected to reach USD 15.80 billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.3%. This growth is primarily attributed to the increasing uptake of access control technologies.

data.title: PRN Test reports test news article in "THE QUICK BROWN FOX JUMPS OVER THE LAZY DOG'S TAIL" - Cleveland, Oct. 4, 2025.
data.description: Latest report from Cleveland on Oct. 4, 2025, reveals a significant event where the Quick Brown Fox successfully jumped over the Lazy Dog's tail. This milestone achievement has garnered attention and praise. More updates on this story to follow.

data.title: Financial Gravity Companies, Inc. secured a credit facility with Prospeq to aid in advisor acquisitions and transition financing.
data.description: On October 4, 2025, Financial Gravity Companies, Inc. (OTC: FGCO), a prominent provider of family office services and financial solutions, disclosed the finalization of a credit facility agreement with Prospeq. This development signifies a strategic move for Financial Gravity as they continue to expand their services and offerings.

data.title: Dr. Joseph Fournier of Friends of Science Society debunks "Cows are the New Coal" on methane emissions, focuses on farming.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on September 25, 2025, Dr. Joseph Fournier, a Senior Scientist and rancher, delivered a presentation titled "Food Prices, Farming, and Net Zero Ideology" for the Friends of Science Society. During the presentation, he discussed four key themes related to the topic.

data.title: DeFi markets could gain trillions with Confidential lending using Fully Homomorphic Encryption for private lending and transactions.
data.description: The implementation of Fully Homomorphic Encryption is anticipated to revolutionize traditional finance for DeFi by facilitating private lending, encrypted credit scores, and confidential transactions. This breakthrough technology has the potential to unlock trillions of dollars within the industry, paving the way for advanced financial services in a secure and private manner.

data.title: $300B in stablecoin market seen as 'rocket fuel' for crypto surge, indicating deeper ties with global finance, experts say.
data.description: Experts told Cointelegraph that the stablecoin supply hitting a landmark $300 billion could serve as a catalyst for the crypto market, likening it to "rocket fuel." This milestone not only highlights the market's growth but also indicates a deepening connection with the global financial sector.

data.title: Stock market rises, Nvidia a buy, Palantir a sell; Tesla has big news ahead. Dow Futures rallying.
data.description: The stock market is currently soaring with the Dow Jones hitting new highs. Nvidia is considered a strong buy at the moment, contrasted by Palantir which has experienced a sell signal. Tesla is poised for major developments in the near future. Investors are also keeping an eye on the upcoming OpenAI conference and the sales of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC). This indicates a potential rally in the market, according to a recent update without reference.

data.title: UK government ponders fate of 61,000 BTC ($7B) seized in recent case, sparking debate in crypto industry circles.
data.description: There is disagreement within the crypto industry regarding the UK government's handling of 61,000 BTC confiscated in a recent criminal case.

data.title: Direxion to close 3 ETFs due to lack of assets. Board recommended liquidating for shareholders' benefit.
data.description: In New York, USA, on Oct. 04, 2025, it was announced that the Direxion Shares ETF Trust will liquidate and close three ETFs due to their struggle in attracting enough investment assets. This decision was made by the Board of Trustees, following the advice of the Funds’ adviser, Rafferty Asset Management, LLC. The Board determined that this action would be most advantageous for the Funds and their shareholders. The ETFs slated for closure are yet to be named.

data.title: Luggex introduces FLO 5 Core, a premium business traveler's suitcase launching on Oct. 4, 2025 in NYC.
data.description: On October 4, 2025, a new suitcase designed for business travelers, the FLO 5 Core by Luggex, was introduced in New York. This innovative suitcase aims to enhance efficiency and style for professionals on the go. It is tailored to cater to the needs of business travelers, offering a seamless experience. The FLO 5 Core by Luggex is equipped with features that set it apart from traditional luggage options. With an emphasis on performance and style, it provides a solution for those seeking convenience during their travels. The suitcase is designed to meet the demands of modern business travel, offering a balance between functionality and aesthetics.
